description: Constitutional validation result with rich violation tracking (src/shared/models/constitutional_validation.py). Formalizes the ViolationLike duck-typed Protocol — consumers that previously relied on Protocol conformance can rely on this contract instead. Two subclasses exist in the same file: ConstitutionalFileValidationResult (adds file_path: str, schema_path: str) and ConstitutionalBatchValidationResult (single field: results: list[ConstitutionalValidationResult]). Both subclasses are noted here but governed separately only if audit flags drift — the AST gate extracts only directly-declared annotations, so subclass contracts would govern only the added fields. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.

is_valid.description: True if the validation passed with no violations.

violations.description: List of violation objects (list[Any] — typed loosely to accept both ViolationReport and ViolationLike protocol instances). Default empty list.

source.description: Identifier of the validator that produced this result. Default 'unknown'.

metadata.description: Validator-specific structured metadata. Default empty dict.
